rag_rules: Latched expressions must be used only on input data ports or event expressions over input event data ports in component implementations
Binary 'and' expressions require both sides to be of type bool; fix type mismatches by correcting operand types or removing invalid clauses
AGREE guarantees referencing component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes unless they are implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Generated AGREE expressions must preserve type consistency and use only visible identifiers from the current scope
Component type contracts should reference only visible features and avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths
AGREE scalar types must be int, real, or bool; avoid referencing AADL property names as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks within component type or implementation scopes
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
Helper functions and constants must be declared within the same annex and use valid AADL data types
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes; move them to implementation scopes instead
Do not attempt to resolve missing identifiers by inventing new declarations; remove invalid clauses instead
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
